channel.title: Lazurite on Piecewise
channel.description: Recent content in Lazurite on Piecewise

item.title: configure (ignore_errors) ignore errors
item.description: In Piecewise Jump to block Configure advanced Piecewise settings. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description ignore_errors any ? Ignore errors when running. Errors will be printed to the console, but won’t crash your program. This may be useful in some situations, but we recommend leaving this off. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.

item.title: stop
item.description: In Piecewise Jump to block Stop the bot as soon as possible. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_control_stop","message0":"%1 stop","args0":[{"type":"field_image","src":"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAA8AAAAPCAYAAAA71pVKAAAAAXNSR0IArs4c6QAAAHlJREFUOE9jNDY2/s9AJmAEaX7Tfpxk7SKVlgwomkECIAAzDJ2PbAOKZphCXE5Adx2q5iprhjdtR8F6sbkAWTNMniQ/o7uOaM0wjWfPnmWEeY0kzcgaQQaQpBmkgSybkQOSZGejxzFJzkaPf4wURkoapY5mUmxEVgsAMiVYMMGwi0YAAAAASUVORK5CYII=","width":15,"height":15,"alt":"Piecewise"}],"colour":180,"tooltip":"Stop the bot as soon as possible.","previousStatement":null,"category":"Piecewise"}); Blockly.Blocks[block.type] = { init: function () { this.jsonInit(block) } } Blockly.inject(document.querySelector("#blockly"), { readOnly: true }); if( block.blockXml ){ Blockly.

item.title: [deprecated] pick random from list (array)
item.description: In the toolbox This block is deprecated and will be removed in Piecewise 22.03.0. Use ‘in list (list) [get] [random]’ instead. Pick a random item in a list. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description array Array ✓ The list of values to pick from. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: add (time) to date (date)
item.description: In the toolbox Add a particular amount of time to a date. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description time time ✓ The time to add. date date ✓ The date to add the specified time to. Output date - The resulting date. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: add (value) to (property) of (array)
item.description: In the toolbox Push a value to the end of a list. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description value any ✓ The value to add to the list. property any ✓ Where to add the new value. array Array ✓ The list to add the value to. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs

item.title: convert text (text) to number
item.description: In the toolbox Convert text represented in text to a number. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description text String ✓ The text to convert to a number. Output Number - The number. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_parse_int","message0":"convert text %1 to number","args0":[{"type":"input_value","name":"text","check":"String","required":true,"doc_description":"The text to convert to a number.

item.title: create empty table
item.description: In the toolbox Create an empty table. Output table window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_table_create","message0":"create empty table","colour":345,"tooltip":"Create an empty table.","helpUrl":"","output":["lazurite_table"]}); Blockly.Blocks[block.type] = { init: function () { this.jsonInit(block) } } Blockly.inject(document.querySelector("#blockly"), { readOnly: true }); if( block.blockXml ){ Blockly.Xml.domToWorkspace(Blockly.Xml.textToDom("" + block.blockXml + ""), Blockly.getMainWorkspace()); } else { Blockly.Xml.domToWorkspace(Blockly.Xml.textToDom(""), Blockly.getMainWorkspace()); } }; });

item.title: create table with pairs (pairs)
item.description: In the toolbox Create a table with key/value pairs. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description pairs statements… ✓ The pairs to add to the table. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_table_create_pairs","message0":"create table with pairs %1 %2"

item.title: delete key (key) from table (table)
item.description: In the toolbox Delete a key from a table. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description key String ✓ The key to delete. table table ✓ The table to delete the key from. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: format text (text) with (values)
item.description: In the toolbox Format a text string with values. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description text String ✓ The text to format. Each {X} will be replaced with the corresponding value, i.e. {1} will be replaced with the first value, {2} with the second, etc. values any ✓ The values to interpolate. Output String window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: get key (key) from table (table)
item.description: In the toolbox Get the value from a table associated with a particular key. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description key String ✓ The key to get. table table ✓ The table to get the key from. Output String, Boolean, Number, Array, table window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.

item.title: keys of table (table)
item.description: In the toolbox Get the keys of a table. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description table table ✓ The table to get the keys of. Output Array window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_table_keys","message0":"keys of table %1","args0":[{"type":"input_value","name":"table","check":"lazurite_table","doc_description":"The table to get the keys of.","required":true}],"output":["Array"],"colour":345,"tooltip":"Get the keys of a table.

item.title: list (array) contains (value)
item.description: In the toolbox Determine whether a list contains an element. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description array Array ✓ The list of values to find the specified element in. value any ✓ The value to find in the list. Output Boolean window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: load list from file (file)
item.description: In the toolbox Load a list from a file previously saved with “save list to file”. If the file doesn’t exist, or does not return an array, returns an empty list. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description file String ✓ The name of the file to load the list from, relative to the .lazurite data directory. Output Array

item.title: load table from file (file)
item.description: In the toolbox Load a table from a file previously saved with “save table to file”. If the file doesn’t exist, or does not return an table, returns empty table. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description file String ✓ The file to load the table from, relative to the .lazurite data directory. Output table window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: new line
item.description: In the toolbox Inserts a new line. Output String window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_new_line","message0":"new line","output":["String"],"colour":160,"tooltip":"Inserts a new line.","helpUrl":""}); Blockly.Blocks[block.type] = { init: function () { this.jsonInit(block) } } Blockly.inject(document.querySelector("#blockly"), { readOnly: true }); if( block.blockXml ){ Blockly.Xml.domToWorkspace(Blockly.Xml.textToDom("" + block.blockXml + ""), Blockly.getMainWorkspace()); } else { Blockly.Xml.domToWorkspace(Blockly.Xml.textToDom(""), Blockly.getMainWorkspace()); } }; });

item.title: parse date from text (text)
item.description: In the toolbox Parse a date from a string. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description text String ✓ The text to parse into a date. Output date - The date as a date object, if it can be parsed - otherwise null. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: print (print)
item.description: In the toolbox Print a message or value to the console. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description print any ✓ The message or value to print to the console. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: replace (needle) with (replacement) in (haystack)
item.description: In the toolbox Replace the specified text with the specified replacement. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description needle String ✓ The text to replace. replacement String ✓ The text to replace the specified text with. haystack String ✓ The text to search for the specified text in. Output String - The modified text. window.

item.title: reverse list (array)
item.description: In the toolbox Reverse a list, i.e. flip it from back to front. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description array Array ✓ The list to reverse. Output Array - The reversed list. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_array_reverse","message0":"reverse list %1","args0":[{"type":"input_value","name":"array","check":"Array","doc_description":"The list to reverse.

item.title: save list (array) to file (file)
item.description: In the toolbox Save a list to a local file, to be loaded later with “load list from file”. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description array Array ✓ The list of values to save. file String ✓ The name of the file to save the list to, relative to the .lazurite data directory. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs

item.title: save table (table) to file (file)
item.description: In the toolbox Save a table to a local file, to be loaded later with “load table from file”. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description table table ✓ The table to save. file String ✓ The file to save the table to, relative to the .lazurite data directory. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs

item.title: set (VAR) to (value) in this block set only
item.description: In the toolbox Set a variable within this block set only. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description VAR any ✓ The name of the variable to set. value any ✓ The value to set the variable to. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.

item.title: set key (key) to (value) in table (table)
item.description: In the toolbox Set the key in a table to a value. NOTE: You should only insert CONSTANTS into tables (i.e. channel IDs, user IDs as opposed to channels and users). Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description key String ✓ The key to set. value String OR Boolean OR Number OR Array OR table ✓ The value to set. table table ✓ The table to modify.

item.title: table (table) contains key (key)
item.description: In the toolbox Determine whether a key exists in a table. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description table table ✓ The table to check. key String ✓ The key to check for. Output Boolean window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_table_contains_key","message0":"table %1 contains key %2"

item.title: table pair with key (key) value (value)
item.description: In the toolbox A key/value pair in a table. Use this with the ‘create table with pairs’ block. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description key String ✓ The key to use. value any ✓ The value to use. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: text (haystack) contains (needle)
item.description: In the toolbox Determine whether text (the haystack) contains a text fragment (the needle). Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description haystack String ✓ The text to search in. needle String ✓ The text to search for. Output Boolean window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: text (text) (starts_or_ends) with (prefix_or_suffix)
item.description: In the toolbox Determine if text starts or ends with other text. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description text String ✓ The text to check. starts_or_ends any ✓ The operation to run. prefix_or_suffix String ✓ The text to check the input for. Output Boolean - Whether ‘text’ is prefixed or suffixed with ‘prefix_or_suffix’. window.

item.title: try (statements) 🔥 catch error as (error) (catch)
item.description: In System → Error Handling Jump to block Run code, and if an error occurs, execute the catch block set. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description statements statements… ✓ The statements to execute. error String ✓ The name of the variable to store the error message in. catch statements… ✓ The statements to execute if an error occurs.

item.title: ⏰ (count) (unit)
item.description: In the toolbox Specifies an amount of time. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description count Number ✓ The quantity of time. unit any ✓ The unit of time. Output time window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_timer_time","message0":"⏰ %1 %2","args0":[{"type":"input_value","name":"count","check":"Number","doc_description":"The quantity of time.

item.title: ⏰ (property) of date (date)
item.description: In the toolbox Get a property of a specified date. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description property any ✓ The property to get. date date ✓ The date to get the property from. Output Number - The value of the specified property. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: ⏰ after (time) do (statements)
item.description: In the toolbox Schedule a task to run after a certain amount of time. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description time time ✓ The amount of time to wait. statements statements… ✓ The statements to execute after the specified time has elapsed. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: ⏰ create date in (timezone) with year (year) month (month) day (day) hours (hours) minutes (minutes) seconds (seconds)
item.description: In the toolbox Create a date to specifications in the server’s timezone, the specified timezone, or UTC/GMT. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description timezone any ✓ The timezone to use to create this date. year Number ✓ The year. month Number ✓ The month. day Number ✓ The day. hours Number ✓ The hours.

item.title: ⏰ every (when) do (statement)
item.description: In the toolbox Run code when an interval of time has elapsed, i.e. every 5 seconds. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description when time ✓ The interval to run the statements at. statement statements… ✓ The statements to run at the specified interval. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: ⏰ now
item.description: In the toolbox A date representing the time this block eas executed. Output date window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_date_now","message0":"⏰ now","inputsInline":false,"output":["lazurite_date"],"colour":45,"tooltip":"A date representing the time this block eas executed.","helpUrl":""}); Blockly.Blocks[block.type] = { init: function () { this.jsonInit(block) } } Blockly.inject(document.querySelector("#blockly"), { readOnly: true }); if( block.blockXml ){ Blockly.Xml.domToWorkspace(Blockly.Xml.textToDom("" + block.blockXml + ""), Blockly.getMainWorkspace()); } else { Blockly.

item.title: ⏰ stop
item.description: In the toolbox Stop the current interval from running again. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_timer_stop","message0":"⏰ stop","previousStatement":null,"nextStatement":null,"colour":45,"tooltip":"Stop the current interval from running again.","helpUrl":""}); Blockly.Blocks[block.type] = { init: function () { this.jsonInit(block) } } Blockly.inject(document.querySelector("#blockly"), { readOnly: true }); if( block.blockXml ){ Blockly.Xml.domToWorkspace(Blockly.Xml.textToDom("" + block.

item.title: ⏰ time elapsed between (time1) and (time2)
item.description: In the toolbox Determine the time elapsed between two dates. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description time1 date ✓ The first date to compare. time2 date ✓ The second date to compare. Output time window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"lazurite_date_elapsed","message0":"⏰ time elapsed between %1 and %2"

item.title: ⏰ wait (time)
item.description: In the toolbox Wait for the specified amount of time, then continue on to the next block. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description time time ✓ The amount of time to wait. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: 🔔 when (event) do (statement)
item.description: In Piecewise Jump to block Run code when an event occurs, such as the bot starting. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description event any ✓ The event to listen to. statement statements… ✓ The statements to execute when the event is triggered. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.
